steps.title: Identify the key word in the opening phrase
steps.content: ”Initially overlooked as insignificant research” specifies that what was overlooked is research. The subject must represent research.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: Choice C provides “Milstein's 1975 study of monoclonal antibodies,” where “study” represents the research that was overlooked. Choices A and B position “Milstein” as the subject (not research), while choice D makes “monoclonal antibodies” the subject (also not research). That matches choice C — C is correct.
